title: Cross-asset regime (#4) child-spec prerequisites — HIGH blockers before planning
source: Two adversarial expert reviews of the multi-asset/cross-regime program spec (2026-05-27). Both verdicts BLOCKED piece #4 from going to planning.
why: Piece #4 (cross-asset regime, own_4 x driver_2 = 8) is the user-requested feature but cannot enter planning until a child spec resolves three HIGH findings the expert review raised. (H1) 8 is a vocabulary size, not a tradeable count: XAU's own regimes are already {BULL_QUIET .606, BEAR_QUIET .295, BULL_STRESSED .088, BEAR_STRESSED .011} with only 2 comfortably sufficient; a binary driver split halves each cell and attacks n_episodes harder than n_bars. The child spec must publish a measured surviving-cell projection. (H2) The 0.8/100 falsification tightening is asserted, not derived: cross-asset adds >=2 researcher DOF (driver x axis x continuous threshold). Must forbid free-floating threshold axes in v1, tie strictness to a declared/logged trials budget with a DSR/Bonferroni haircut (metrics.py already computes DSR), and land the criterion in SKILL.md (the source of truth). (H3) The PIT cross-asset as-of join is the program's most dangerous lookahead surface and is specified in one sentence: needs a strict-'<' as-of contract, composed burn-in (union of traded + driver burn-in), and a frequency-aware FRED publication lag (the existing .shift(1) is daily-calendar, wrong for H4) — each with a leak-injection test. Plus M1: mechanical co-integration (DXY->EUR, foreign-2Y->same-currency FX, EUR->GBP) must be a HARD BLOCK via a driver-eligibility matrix, not a correlation flag; and M4: the driver name is reconstructable from a class+axis dossier, so a new driver block + fresh lookahead_lint pass is required.
value_rationale: H: this is the gating set for the user's headline requested feature (cross-asset regime). Until resolved, #4 cannot be planned or built.
scope: Write a #4 child spec under docs/superpowers/specs/ resolving H1/H2/H3 + M1 + M4.
H1: measured surviving-cell projection (run on XAU/XAG first) + episode-count projection; state honest expectation (~2-4 of 8 on deep assets).
H2: forbid free-floating threshold axes in v1; declared+logged trials budget; DSR/Bonferroni haircut; land cross-asset falsification criterion in SKILL.md not just spec prose.
H3: strict-'<' as-of-join contract; composed burn-in = max(traded, driver-mapped); frequency-aware FRED lag; leak-injection test for each.
M1: driver-eligibility matrix in the asset registry with a shares_a_leg boolean; orchestrator BLOCKS ineligible driver<->traded pairs.
M4: new dossier 'driver' block design + fresh lookahead_lint pass (driver name must not reach hypothesis/causal_story); check (traded_class, driver_class, axis) is not a near-unique identifier.
Proposal schema gains a driver block {asset_or_series, class, axis} (no free threshold v1); pin driver labeling by driver_regime_parquet_sha256 for reproducibility.
out_of_scope: Implementing #4 itself; #3 (multi-asset regime/dossier batch, planned separately); building the long-FX-history pull (piece #1).
